input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.7
            TITLE: switch function

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.7: Switch Function
IN.10.7 Switch Function 
The function of one or more of the Primary Master Switch IC.9.3, Cockpit Main Switch IC.9.4, 
and/or BOTS T.3.3 will be verified during the Noise Test

final_answer: Switch Function IN.10.7 Switch Function The function of one or more of the Primary Master Switch IC.9.3, Cockpit Main Switch IC.9.4, and/or BOTS T.3.3 will be verified during the Noise Test
